summary: Complete testing of Fatture Ricevute module. Backend: 21/21 tests PASS (fixed extract-articoli bug). Frontend: All UI components verified working - page, KPIs, table, filters, dropdown menu, detail dialog, payment dialog, XML import button.

bugs_fixed.issue: extract_articoli endpoint returned 500 when codice_articolo was None - AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'strip'
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed `linea.get('codice_articolo', '').strip()` to `(linea.get('codice_articolo') or '').strip()` to handle None values

backend_auth.unauthenticated_requests: PASS - All endpoints return 401 without session cookie

backend_crud.GET /api/fatture-ricevute/: PASS - Returns list with KPIs (totale_fatture, totale_pagato, da_pagare, count)
backend_crud.POST /api/fatture-ricevute/: PASS - Creates received invoice with linee, payment tracking fields
backend_crud.GET /api/fatture-ricevute/{fr_id}: PASS - Returns single invoice with linee
backend_crud.DELETE /api/fatture-ricevute/{fr_id}: PASS - Deletes invoice, returns 404 on re-fetch

backend_xml_import.POST /api/fatture-ricevute/import-xml: PASS - Imports FatturaPA XML, extracts fornitore, linee, totali, pagamento

backend_payments.GET /api/fatture-ricevute/{fr_id}/pagame: PASS - Returns payment schedule (total_document, pagamenti, totale_pagato, residuo, payment_status)
backend_payments.POST /api/fatture-ricevute/{fr_id}/pagam: PASS - Records payment, updates totale_pagato, residuo, payment_status
backend_payments.full_payment: PASS - Status becomes 'pagata', invoice status also updated
backend_payments.overpayment: PASS - Returns 400 when payment exceeds residuo

backend_extract_articoli.POST /api/fatture-ricevute/{fr_id}/extra: PASS - Extracts line items to catalogo articoli (creates/updates with storico_prezzi)

backend_filters.search: PASS - GET ?q=xxx searches by fornitore_nome or numero_documento

frontend_page.kpi_cards: PASS - Totale Fatture, Pagato, Da Pagare with data-testid

frontend_table.columns: PASS - Fornitore, Tipo, Numero, Data, Totale, Pagato, Da Pagare, Stato, XML

frontend_dropdown.menu_items: PASS - Dettagli, Gestisci Pagamenti, Estrai Articoli, Segna come Registrata, Elimina

frontend_detail_dialog.title: PASS - 'Fattura {numero} — {fornitore}'
frontend_detail_dialog.linee_table: PASS - Cod, Descrizione, Q.tà, Prezzo, Importo columns

frontend_payment_dialog.payment_form: PASS - Importo, Data, Metodo, Note fields
frontend_payment_dialog.record_payment: PASS - Payment recorded, dialog updated, KPIs refreshed

frontend_xml_import.file_input: PASS - Hidden file input accepts .xml files

critical_code_review_comments: Fatture Ricevute module fully implemented and working
Fixed extract_articoli bug - None value handling for codice_articolo field
XML parser correctly handles FatturaPA v1.2 with namespace handling
Payment tracking follows same pattern as outgoing invoices (Scadenze)
seed_data_creation: Created test invoice UI_TEST-001 during UI tests (cleaned up after)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fatture Ricevute module fully tested: 1) Backend CRUD + XML import + payments + extract articoli, 2) Frontend FattureRicevutePage with KPIs, table, filters, dropdown menu, detail dialog, payment dialog. Fixed bug in extract_articoli where None codice_articolo caused AttributeError. All data-testids in place for testing.
